reviews.comment:
Buena atención pero note un problema de distribución en las bombas. Los autos no pueden acceder a las bombas de adelante hasta que no se desocupa la de atras.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but I noticed a distribution problem with the pumps. The cars can't access the front pumps until the rear one is free.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8340619594879844057/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncnZTVm93RRAB

reviews.comment:
Hay que ir con paciencia, lugar no apto para apurado, de los que tienen que ir al trabajo.

(Translated by Google)
You have to be patient, this is not a place for those in a hurry, for those who have to go to work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8340619594879844057/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBbWRiUXl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Bien la atención. Pero escaso el personal.  Los baños son escasos y no muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
The service was good, but there weren't enough staff. The bathrooms were few and not very clean.
